channel.title: Proximity Search on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Proximity Search on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Advanced full-text search in Azure DocumentDB
item.description:
Azure DocumentDB public preview adds advanced full-text search features: fuzzy search, proximity search, expanded language support, and BM25 ranking. It combines these text search capabilities with vector search in a single database.

  • Source: Azure Updates
